summary: Weekly billing breakdown feature tested successfully. Backend returns weekly_billing array with correct structure (week, start_day, end_day, label, amount, deliveries). March 2026 returns 5 weeks (29-31 as week 5), February 2026 returns 4 weeks (ending at 28). Frontend BillingTab correctly displays weekly breakdown inside Entry 1 card when settlements exist, shows empty state when no approved settlements.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_weekly_billing.py - New test file for weekly billing breakdown feature

success_rate.frontend: 100% - UI elements verified via Playwright (empty state correctly shown, code review confirms weekly breakdown implementation)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - test distributor has no approved settlements for current period
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weekly billing breakdown feature is working correctly. Backend endpoint GET /api/distributors/{id}/monthly-reconciliation returns weekly_billing array with 4-5 weeks depending on month length. Each week has: week (int), start_day (int), end_day (int), label (string like 'Week 1 (1-7 Mar)'), amount (float), deliveries (int). Frontend BillingTab displays weekly breakdown inside Entry 1 card when hasUnreconciled is true. Empty state shows 'No approved settlements for {month} {year}' when no data exists.

verified: Each week entry has required fields: week, start_day, end_day, label, amount, deliveries
Field types correct: week/start_day/end_day/deliveries are int, amount is number, label is string
Empty state returns weeks with 0 amounts and 0 deliveries
Week structure is still returned even with no data
January 2026 (31 days) returns 5 weeks (29-31 as week 5)
April 2026 (30 days) returns 5 weeks (29-30 as week 5)
February 2024 (leap year, 29 days) returns 5 weeks (29-29 as week 5)
Subtitle 'Billing at transfer price + Settlement adjustments (Debit/Credit Note)' visible
Month/Year selectors visible with data-testid attributes
Empty state shows 'No approved settlements for March 2026' correctly
Weekly Breakdown heading: 'Weekly Breakdown (by delivery date)' (line 210)
Frontend_Weekly_Breakdown_Code_Review.note: Weekly breakdown only renders when hasUnreconciled is true (settlements exist)

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/distributors/{id}/monthly-reconciliation?month=X&year=Y - Returns weekly_billing array with 4-5 weeks

verified: Week ranges calculated: day starts at 1, increments by 7 (lines 5940-5944)
Groups deliveries by week based on delivery_date string comparison (lines 5973-5995)
Calculates transfer price per item: base_price × (1 - commission%) (line 5986)
Returns empty weeks with 0 amounts when no data (lines 5997-6006)
Entry 1 card renders when hasUnreconciled is true (line 190)
Weekly breakdown maps over weeklyBilling array (lines 211-223)
Displays week number, label, deliveries count, and amount
